reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
- Khách ko đông nhưng thủ tục checkin rất lâu. Nv ko chủ động hướng dẫn mà để khách hỏi mới dẫn ra chỗ thang máy để lên phòng.

 Tóm lại là thất vọng.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Trước tiên, chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn khách sạn và dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng dịch vụ và tiện nghi tại khách sạn chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của Quý khách.

Những góp ý liên quan đến quy trình nhận phòng, sự chủ động trong hỗ trợ khách, chất lượng phòng cũng như bữa sáng và thái độ phục vụ, chúng tôi xin ghi nhận một cách nghiêm túc. Đây là những vấn đề chúng tôi cần nhanh chóng cải thiện để nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ và mang lại trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho khách hàng trong tương lai.

Thay mặt toàn bộ đội ngũ, chúng tôi gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành đến Quý khách vì những bất tiện đã gặp phải. Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón và phục vụ Quý khách chu đáo hơn trong những lần lưu trú sau.

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản lý Khách sạn

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nice hotel and large room
reviews.negatives: Service left much to be desired for a 5 star hotel. Arrived half past 10 in the evening. There was no bell hop to help with luggage. The service desk checking us in didn't acknowledge the fact that I told them I was hearing impaired and needed her to talk louder. Service desk later showed annoyance when we had to change rooms to a twin bed room and stated she told me it was a king room. Um... I told her I was hearing impaired in the first place and if she didn't choose to speak louder, I did not hear that part.

reviews.title: Unhelpful Reception Staff
reviews.text: Nice view as booked the executive room, however when we asked for a bottle of water as were checking out only to be told “ you cannot” even if we were willing to pay for it.

reviews.title: I prefer Marriott but this is what was available. No thanks.
reviews.positives: The front desk staff was great. Hotel room was big and clean.
reviews.negatives: Some of the staff makes it obvious that they don’t want you there if you aren’t of Asian descent. So be prepared for that experience in all of Vietnam anyway. I walked into breakfast with a group of Asian people. The hotel staff bust through them like JJ Watt to see my room key but didn’t ask anyone else. The WiFi is garbage. You’re better off not connecting. Outside of the hotel is dirty, trash everywhere and since it seems pretty new there is absolutely nothing around.

reviews.title: Comment

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Comment
reviews.text:
- Newly built hotel, generally beautiful, with basic amenities
- Buffet food is varied, generally delicious
- Staff is polite, new so not very professional yet, but generally good
- Location is near the beach but not close to the swimming area, only able to swim at the hotel
- Due to being fully booked, the hotel could not provide extra beds for children accompanying guests, but still charged extra fees (told the hotel but they did not agree)
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Nam,

Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ cảm nhận của mình khi lưu trú tại Sea Stars Hotel Ha Long
Sea Stars Hotel Ha Long luôn cố gắng mang đến trải nghiệm dịch vụ cao cấp cho mọi khách hàng, do đó thông tin phản hồi của anh là rất quan trọng đối với chúng tôi. Hãy yên tâm rằng chúng tôi đang thực hiện các biện pháp thích hợp để giải quyết vấn đề và ngăn ngừa sự cố xảy ra trong tương lai.
Chân thành cảm ơn anh đã tin tưởng chia sẽ mối quan tâm của mình và chúng tôi hy vọng rằng anh sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ tốt hơn trong tương lai gần.

Trân Trọng,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel itself is stunning and the rooms are very comfortable there is just nothing around. The rooftop pool was very nice and the breakfast was one of the best hotel breakfasts.
reviews.negatives: There is nowhere close by to get food and the restaurant at the hotel is very slow and quite expensive.

reviews.title: Enough to be satisfied.
reviews.text:
Pros:
- The room is small but clean, tidy, and well-equipped. The view is 100% of the bay and Vinpearl. The bathroom is quite spacious.
- Both the indoor and outdoor pools are beautiful. Lifeguards are always on duty.
- Breakfast is delicious with many options. The soup dish changes daily.
—-
Cons:
- A bit far from the center.
- The bathroom in the gym and pool area has a strong unpleasant smell.
- The bar is not fully utilized and is somewhat simple.
- Staff in the lobby area are not proactive in guiding customers (welcome drink, seating, luggage…)
- The playground next to the outdoor pool is quite old, small, hot, and has an unpleasant smell.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách Duy,

Thay mặt toàn thể đội ngũ Khách sạn Radisson Blu Hạ Long, tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành đến Quý khách vì đã lựa chọn lưu trú và dành thời gian chia sẻ những đánh giá rất chi tiết về trải nghiệm vừa qua.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với sự sạch sẽ, tiện nghi và tầm nhìn đẹp từ phòng nghỉ, cũng như chất lượng bữa sáng và khu vực bể bơi – những điểm luôn được chúng tôi chú trọng duy trì theo tiêu chuẩn thương hiệu quốc tế.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận nghiêm túc những góp ý rất cụ thể từ Quý khách về khu vực phòng tắm bể bơi và khu vui chơi trẻ em để chúng tôi tiếp thu và giải quyết dứt điểm.

Về dịch vụ tại sảnh, chúng tôi đã trao đổi lại với đội ngũ tiền sảnh để cải thiện khả năng chủ động trong việc chào đón và hướng dẫn khách.

Những phản hồi từ Quý khách là cơ hội quý báu để chúng tôi hoàn thiện dịch vụ, và chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ tiếp tục được đón tiếp Quý khách trong những kỳ nghỉ sắp tới với trải nghiệm ngày càng tốt hơ

reviews.title: Radisson blu is a good hotel everywhere
reviews.positives:
Here's a review you can post on Booking.com:
A Comfortable Stay with Excellent Facilities, Though Location Requires Planning
We had a good stay at the Radisson Blu Hotel Halong Bay. The hotel itself is lovely, with spacious rooms that have every amenity you could need, and the facilities are truly great – perfect for a relaxing getaway.
The service was generally good. While at times it felt a bit stretched due to how busy they were, especially with many families and children, we understood that this was a result of the high number of guests. The staff tried their best to accommodate everyone.
The only minor drawback for us was the location. While the bay views are beautiful, there isn't really anything within walking distance, so you'll need to plan for transportation if you want to explore outside the hotel.
Overall, if you're looking for a comfortable hotel with fantastic facilities and don't mind relying on taxis or tours to get around, this is a solid choice.

reviews.title: Beautiful resort, but with no life.
reviews.text:
The bathroom was the most beautiful one I’ve had in any hotel. The room was huge. The facilities are great, especially the pools and spa. 
However, there were so few people at the hotel, they shut down the main restaurant, turned off air conditioning and lights in many of the public areas, so we felt like we were in a ghost town. 
Unfortunately we don’t speak Vietnamese, and there was no one in the hotel that spoke English so it was difficult to ask for help other than google translator. 
Compared to all the other hotels we stayed in through Vietnam, the staff weren’t as friendly and appeared unmotivated.

reviews.title: Location is great, but don’t expect too much from the services as you would with other good hotels.

reviews.title: The worst experience I have ever had.
reviews.text: I booked 02 deluxe rooms for a family of 4 and received an upgrade to Grandsuit via email from Agoda or the hotel. I replied to the email agreeing and arranged to meet at the hotel. However, when I arrived, the hotel said they did not receive my response so the Grandsuit rooms were fully booked. I suggested they check again and provided evidence of the email I sent. I waited 40 minutes in the lobby without receiving a response; they blamed the sales staff, Agoda... then I received 2 upgraded rooms with a sea view. Overall, I am really unsatisfied with the front desk staff and the front office manager. I will never return here.

reviews.title: Good value.
reviews.text:
I stayed 5 nights at the hotel, the bed was comfortable, the indoor pool was nice. Too bad the outdoor pool was under maintenance, so didn't get to enjoy it. The sauna and steam room requires you to use their spa service in order to use it for free. 

The only issue I had at the hotel was when I checked in, they gave me a family room with the city views when I specifically paid for the ocean/bay views on Agoda. They told me that I booked a family room and that room I got was a family room. I had to tell them that this is  not the room I paid and I want a bay view room. It was only after that they told me the room is occupied tonight, but we will switch for you for the rest of the stay tomorrow. I asked for money back for having to stay in a non bay view room, but they said it was the same price and didn't really give me any kind of compensation for it.  

Also during breakfast on Friday, there were more people staying at the hotel. and there may not have been enough seats. I found a table that was free for 4 people. Went away to get good and when I came back 2 other people were sitting at my table. They didn't even ask and I was a female traveller, they were 2 male friends. I had to go tell one of the staff to please tell them that I do not wish to share the table. The staff was nice and did tell them, which they moved. But I felt if you are the kind of person who would feel uncomfortable telling the staff but still prefer your own table, you might want to go have breakfast closer to when Breakfast ends, or first thing in the morning to avoid the crowd perhaps on the weekends. During the week, it was great.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such detailed feedback about your five-night stay with us. We truly appreciate your openness, as it helps us better understand our guests’ experiences.

We are pleased to know that you found the bed comfortable and enjoyed our indoor pool. At the same time, we sincerely apologize that the outdoor pool was under maintenance during your stay and that this prevented you from enjoying it. We also regret any confusion regarding access to the sauna and steam room and acknowledge that clearer communication would have been helpful.

We would like to express our sincere apologies for the inconvenience you experienced at check-in regarding your room view. While the room initially assigned was within the correct family room category, we fully understand that you had specifically booked and expected a bay view room. reviews.title: An outstanding hotel.
reviews.text:
The hotel offers great value for money. Although it's not close to the ferry terminal for day trips, it only takes 15 minutes by taxi. The room is very spacious and clean, and the higher floors have a river view! The breakfast has a wide variety of options and is made with care! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 Although I didn't use the pool, it is large and upscale!

However, I feel that the policy is somewhat unreasonable. Since I arrived at the hotel early, I wanted to check in ahead of time, but the front desk charged me for half a day's room fee. In such a large hotel, can't they let someone check in a bit earlier if there are available rooms? Additionally, when I asked the front desk for an extra bottle of water after checking in, they also charged me. I find this a bit petty, which did reduce my overall rating a bit.

Overall, aside from this, the hotel is very good and worth recommending!!!
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your recent stay with us. We are truly delighted to know that you found our hotel to be excellent value for money, appreciated the spacious and clean room, enjoyed the river view from the higher floors, and were impressed with the variety and quality of our breakfast. Your kind words about our facilities, especially the swimming pool, mean a great deal to our team.

We also sincerely appreciate your honest feedback regarding our policies. We understand how important early check-in can be, especially after a long journey. Please allow us to share that early check-in is subject to room availability and, depending on the arrival time, an additional charge may apply in line with our policy. That said, we truly regret if this caused any inconvenience or disappointment during your arrival experience.

Regarding the additional bottled water, our room rate includes a set number of comp

reviews.title: We had a very relaxing stay.

The food was good though more options would be nice. We can definitely recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Not sure if it was off season or not but there wasn’t much to do or see around this area.

reviews.title: Splendid Stay!
reviews.text:
Stayed here recently and overall it was a strong experience.

The hotel itself is well done. The decor and rooms feel modern and comfortable, with a clear premium finish. Facilities match that standard. Everything feels polished and well maintained. The pool is a standout. Large, clean, and surprisingly quiet most of the time, which made it easy to relax.

Service is where the hotel really delivers. Staff were consistently helpful, polite, and attentive without being overbearing. They were also great with our baby, offering support where needed and providing a high chair without us having to ask. It felt genuinely family friendly rather than just marketed that way.

Food was excellent across the board. High quality and well prepared. Breakfast offered a solid mix of continental and international options, so there was enough variety to suit different preferences.

A couple of downsides. Breakfast gets very busy on weekends. By around 8am it becomes crowded, making it hard to move around and find a table. Also, the kids play area was closed for refurbishment, which wasn’t communicated at booking. That should have been made clear upfront.

Overall, a very good stay. Strong service, great facilities, and high quality food. Just needs better communication and crowd management during peak breakfast times.
reviews.response:
Dear Ha,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your recent stay with us.

We are truly delighted to know that you had a splendid experience at our hotel. 

Your kind words about our team mean a great deal to us. We are pleased to know that our staff were attentive and supportive, especially in taking care of your baby and ensuring your family felt genuinely welcomed.

We are also glad that you enjoyed the quality and variety of our food, particularly the breakfast offerings.

reviews.title: Perfect Stay for Our Group Trip
reviews.text:
Our group had a fantastic stay at the Radisson Blu Ha Long Bay. We booked two rooms, both of which were spacious, spotless, and beautifully designed. The beds were incredibly comfortable, and the views made the whole experience feel even more special.

The breakfast was a real highlight — plenty of variety, fresh ingredients, and everything tasted great. It was the perfect way to start each day before heading out to explore.

The staff were consistently warm, attentive, and genuinely helpful. Every interaction felt professional and friendly, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The hotel’s facilities, especially the pool and spa, added a relaxing touch to the trip.

The location is ideal: close enough to enjoy Ha Long Bay’s attractions but still peaceful and relaxing. Overall, our group left extremely satisfied. Highly recommended for anyone visiting the area.
reviews.response:

We really enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend the hotel given the quality of service, room and facilities.

It is also wonderful to hear that you found the surrounding dining options convenient and that the overall quality of our service, rooms, and facilities met your expectations.

Thank you once again for your high recommendation. We sincerely hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,
Oreste Traetto
General Manager

reviews.title: Amazing experience at Radisson Blu
reviews.text: We stayed here for 6 nights and were totally happy with our experience here. All the staff were professional and friendly and all tried to make us happy. I personally like Mrs. Hue, who served fresh Banh Cuốn  and noodle soup at breakfast. Her food was so delicious that I had to have Banh cuon for all 6 morning I stayed there. 4 season swimming pool and gym were nice. Bar and restaurant need to upgrade more with the menu. I guest it was off-season then they don’t fully open up the restaurant with a big menu. Overall I will stay here again when we come back Ha Long.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed and thoughtful review. We are delighted to know that your 6-night stay was enjoyable and that our team made a positive impression with their professionalism and friendliness.

We are especially pleased that you enjoyed Mrs. Hue’s fresh Bánh Cuốn and noodle soups—your kind words have been shared with her, and she will be thrilled to hear that you enjoyed them every morning! It is also great to hear that you appreciated our 4-season swimming pool and gym.

Regarding your feedback on the bar and restaurant menu, we truly value your suggestion. Seasonal adjustments sometimes affect menu offerings, and we will review ways to enhance the variety and experience for our guests.

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Ha Long for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,
Hotel Management

reviews.title: Für ein paar Nächte akzeptabel, jedoch nichts Außergewöhnliches. Auch das Essen im Restaurant konnte nicht überzeugen.
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war relativ groß und bot ausreichend Platz für zwei Personen. Ich kann allerdings nur das Familienzimmer bewerten – ob es bei den Doppelzimmern genauso ist, kann ich nicht beurteilen.
reviews.negatives: Die Lage ist nicht besonders optimal, allerdings kann man sich in Vietnam sehr günstig mit Grab fortbewegen. Was mir persönlich nicht gefallen hat: Ich habe zunächst ein anderes Zimmer als das gebuchte erhalten. Ich hatte extra ein Familienzimmer mit Blick auf die Ha-Long-Bucht gebucht und auch entsprechend mehr bezahlt, bekam jedoch zunächst ein Zimmer mit Stadtblick. Nach meiner Beschwerde habe ich dann das gebuchte Zimmer erhalten. An der Hygiene sowie an der Freundlichkeit des Personals an der Rezeption besteht noch Verbesserungsbedarf.

reviews.title: Excellent Hospitality, Average Facilities
reviews.text: Radisson Hotel is praised for its friendly and helpful staff, convenient yet quiet location, and generous breakfast options. Many guests find the rooms comfortable and appreciate facilities like the gym, spa, and pool. However, some rooms feel outdated, with occasional issues such as worn bathrooms or weak air-conditioning. Noise from hallways or nearby elevators is also sometimes reported. While service quality is generally good, maintenance can be inconsistent depending on the room. Overall, the hotel offers a comfortable stay with strong hospitality, but guests seeking modern facilities may want to request a renovated room.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review. We are truly pleased to hear that you appreciated our warm hospitality, convenient yet peaceful location, and the variety offered in our breakfast. It is also wonderful to know that you found our rooms comfortable and enjoyed facilities such as the gym, spa, and pool.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the areas that did not meet your expectations. Your comments regarding room condition, bathroom wear, and air-conditioning are extremely valuable. We understand how important comfort and consistency are, and we will work closely with our maintenance and housekeeping teams to address these issues promptly. We also appreciate your note about potential noise disturbances, and we will continue exploring solutions to improve the guest experience.

reviews.title: Dornröschenschlaf
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel hat eine tolle Ausstattung. Personal ist sehr freundlich. 
Das Hotel war fast leer, die Bars und das Schwimmbad verweist. Fast etwas gespenstig.
Zimmer sind groß und gut eingerichtet. Housekeeping sehr sorgfältig.
Das Hotel ist aus meiner Sicht kein 5-Star Hotel, weil doch einige Dinge nicht, oder noch nicht rund laufen. 
Kaum Gäste, aber alle waren auf meiner Etage. Leider waren wir Nachbarn sehr laut und das hat man entsprechend gehört. Kleiner Tipp, hier könnte man die Zimmer großzügiger verteilen. 
Indoor Pool war sehr kalt. 
Das schlimmste war aber die Weihnachtsmusik, die aus 3 Liedern bestand und die liefen den ganzen Tag in Dauerschleife. Es gibt andere Weihnachtslieder außer Jingle Bells, Last Christmas und Felice Navidad. 
Das Hotel könnte mehr, wenn man an einigen Dingen was ändert.
Frühstück und auch das Essen waren sehr gut und reichlich.

reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for sharing such a thoughtful review of your stay with us. We are truly delighted to learn that you experienced excellent service across all areas, from our front desk and restaurant to our pool team. Your kind recognition of Dat and his dedication to going the extra mile to make you feel at home and safe means so much to us, and we will be sure to pass along your compliments to him and the team.

It is also wonderful to know that you found your room to be large, clean, and modern, and that the overall experience gave you the feeling of staying at a 5-star hotel while still offering great value. This seems like a really new hotel and everything seems very new and pristine. The staff were friendly and the indoor pool lifeguard can even speak mandarin!

The spa and gym is amazing and very well equipped. 

The acoustics of the rooms (from outside the window) were good as well. When the tropical depression made landfall at midnight, we did not hear or feel anything and the storm just passed us by with us sleeping like a baby! 

Definitely a gem that we luckily chanced upon!

reviews.title: Absolute Weiterempfehlung
reviews.positives:
Das Radisson Blu Ha Long Bay hat uns auf eine unglaublich positive Weise überrascht und gehört definitiv zu unseren Top 5 der 5-Sterne-Hotels.

Schon beim Betreten überzeugt das Design – sehr hochwertig, modern und elegant. Zunächst haben wir ein Zimmer im 13. Stock bekommen, das zwar sehr groß, sauber und schön ausgestattet war (mit Badewanne, Dusche, Balkon und zwei Waschbecken), jedoch nicht ganz unserer gebuchten Kategorie mit vollem Blick auf die Ha Long Bay entsprach.

Nachdem wir dies angesprochen hatten, kam sofort ein Mitarbeiter auf uns zu und zeigte uns ein anderes Zimmer im 18. Stock, das wir über Booking upgegradet haben. Der Ausblick dort war noch beeindruckender, auch wenn das Zimmer etwas kleiner war und keinen Balkon hatte. Das hat uns aber überhaupt nicht gestört – wir haben uns direkt wohlgefühlt und sind dort geblieben.

Der Check-in verlief schnell und professionell, und wir wurden sogar mit einem kalten Getränk empfangen. Besonders angenehm ist die Ruhe im Hotel – gerade im Vergleich zu Hanoi, wo es oft sehr hektisch ist. Hier kann man wirklich abschalten. Generell wirkt Ha Long selbst etwas ruhiger, fast wie eine kleine Geisterstadt – aber das ist ein anderes Thema.

Das Frühstück ist ein absolutes Highlight: wunderschön angerichtet, sehr ästhetisch und unglaublich lecker – es fehlt wirklich an nichts. Ein kleiner Kritikpunkt wäre, dass das Personal beim Frühstück manchmal etwas aufmerksamer sein könnte. Aber das ist wirklich Jammern auf hohem Niveau.

Das Fitnessstudio ist groß, modern und gut ausgestattet. Der Innenpool ist ebenfalls sehr sauber und großzügig. Es gibt auch einen Außenpool, der während unseres Aufenthalts leider geschlossen war. Lustiges Detail: In jedem Zimmer gibt es sogar eine Waage 😄

Wir haben zwei Nächte im Hotel verbracht und können das Radisson Blu Ha Long Bay absolut weiterempfehlen!

reviews.title: Ein rundum perfekter Aufenthalt im Radisson Blu Hotel Ha Long Bay – westlicher Fünf-Sterne-Standard, außergewöhnlicher S
reviews.positives:
Positiv:
Das Radisson Blu Hotel Ha Long Bay ist ein echtes Fünf-Sterne-Hotel – und verdient diese fünf Sterne uneingeschränkt. Alles entspricht absolut westlichem Standard: extrem sauber, sehr hochwertige Innenausstattung, ruhige Atmosphäre im gesamten Haus und durchweg freundliche Mitarbeiter.

Die Zimmer sind modern, sehr gepflegt und hochwertig ausgestattet. Man fühlt sich vom ersten Moment an wohl. Trotz der Größe des Hotels ist es angenehm ruhig.

Die Lage ist etwas außerhalb, aber ideal gelöst: Mit Grab ist man für ca. 50–60.000 VND schnell überall, zum Beispiel bei Sun World Ha Long Complex. Das macht die Lage entspannt und gleichzeitig flexibel.

Das Frühstück ist hervorragend. Man darf nicht vergessen, dass man in Vietnam ist – trotzdem wird hier nicht nur asiatisch, sondern auch absolut auf europäischem Niveau serviert: Omelette-Station, Käse, Wurst, Müsli, Joghurt, viele Säfte, Kaffee, Tee – alles frisch und wird ständig nachgelegt.

Ein ganz besonderes Lob geht an Quang, den Bademeister im Indoor-Pool im 30. Stock. Der über 20 Meter lange Pool ist beeindruckend, aber noch beeindruckender ist seine Begeisterung. Er präsentiert das Schwimmbad mit so viel Stolz und Freude, als hätte er es selbst entworfen. Obwohl dort oft nur wenige Gäste sind, freut er sich über jeden Einzelnen und kümmert sich aufmerksam. Man merkt sofort: Er liebt seinen Job. Solche Mitarbeiter machen den Unterschied.

Cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn Sea Stars Hotel Ha Long là nơi lưu trú trong chuyến đi tại Hạ Long và chúng tôi hy chào đón chị quay trở lại với những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời hơn.

Thân ái,
